name: track-seed-add-follows
note: S-ADD-FOLLOWS round 2 (operator repro 2026-07-17 on the #269 preview: tapping + on a keyed seq-less TRACK - 'Hendrix Style Jam in A Minor' - still vanishes the row). The KEYSEED path creates a seeded custom copy and suppresses the original track row via the track-merge, a DIFFERENT route from the custom-song add the first scenario covered. Contract: after tapping + on a keyed track row, a row with THAT TITLE must be CHECKED and FULLY INSIDE the viewport - the user's eyes never lose it. Written RED against the exact reported flow before any fix.

steps.label: after the keyseed +, a row titled 'Hendrix Style Jam' is CHECKED and FULLY IN VIEWPORT - the tapped row never vanishes from view (operator repro)
steps.js: (function(){var rows=Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('#songsList .listItem'));var r=rows.filter(function(x){return x.textContent.indexOf('Hendrix Style Jam')>=0;})[0];if(!r)return false;var b=r.getBoundingClientRect();return r.classList.contains('inSet') && b.top>=0 && b.bottom<=window.innerHeight;})()

steps.label: and it actually joined the setlist (one entry, the seeded copy)
